claims: Skill marketplaces benefit from categories, searchable cards, filters, and independent disclaimers.
sources.business_meaning: A guardrail store should behave like a product marketplace, not a folder dump.

sources.source_name: Bluebag-style skills as structured workflow packages
claims: Skills are structured workflows with progressive disclosure; they are different from one-off prompts.
sources.business_meaning: AtlasOps should sell operational procedures and proof gates, not magic text.

sources.source_name: IBM RAG and Agentic AI learning categories
claims: RAG grounds generation in retrieved sources; agentic systems add planning, tool use, and validation loops.
sources.business_meaning: Guardrails should require source selection, claim validation, and sufficiency checks before public claims.

claims: Agentic RAG can refine queries, select sources, reason over evidence, and improve answers iteratively.
sources.business_meaning: Atlas needs a repeatable memory intake route from sources to products, posts, and agent teaching.

sources.source_name: CoreStory-style code intelligence and context proof
claims: Coding agent failure is often context failure; persistent code intelligence can complement AGENTS.md and RAG.
sources.business_meaning: AtlasOps should position context intelligence guardrails as operating maps for agents.

claims: Business users respond to practical tool framing, clear use cases, and fast education around what to do next.
sources.business_meaning: Guardrail product pages should translate technical failures into plain business outcomes.

sources.source_name: TheCentral-style AI tutorial and marketplace UX
claims: Readable tutorials and searchable tool listings lower adoption friction for non-specialist buyers.
sources.business_meaning: The store needs search by pain point, role, platform, and failure mode.

claims: NVIDIA documentation is a source hub for NIM, RAG, AI agents, GPU inference, multimodal workflows, CUDA, and AI Enterprise topics.
sources.business_meaning: Atlas should store NVIDIA as a hub and select exact relevant docs later, not ingest the docs root blindly.

sources.source_name: AI tools for product research / product insight workflow
claims: Sanitized market proof: buyers search for AI tooling that helps with product research and product insight workflows.
sources.business_meaning: Guardrail packs should include product research and proof-intake angles without storing tracked private URLs.
